scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/generators/hook-translator dist/auth dist/workflow dist/workflows dist/rules dist/config && bun build src/index.ts src/types/index.ts src/hooks/index.ts src/services/index.ts src/utils/index.ts src/utils/table-naming.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external zod --external kysely --external @electric-sql/pglite --external kysely-pglite-dialect --external better-auth --external @gorules/zen-engine && bun build src/generators/index.ts --outdir dist/generators --target node --format esm --external zod --external kysely --external @electric-sql/pglite --external kysely-pglite-dialect --external @gorules/zen-engine && bun build src/generators/hook-translator/index.ts src/generators/hook-translator/parser.ts src/generators/hook-translator/visitor.ts src/generators/hook-translator/utils.ts src/generators/hook-translator/types.ts --outdir dist/generators/hook-translator --target node --format esm --external zod --external kysely --external @electric-sql/pglite --external kysely-pglite-dialect --external @gorules/zen-engine && bun build src/auth/index.ts src/auth/auth.types.ts src/auth/auth.service.ts src/auth/better-auth.config.ts --outdir dist/auth --target node --format esm --external zod --external kysely --external @electric-sql/pglite --external kysely-pglite-dialect --external better-auth --external @gorules/zen-engine && bun build src/workflow/index.ts src/workflow/workflow.types.ts src/workflow/workflow.service.ts --outdir dist/workflow --target node --format esm --external zod --external kysely --external @electric-sql/pglite --external kysely-pglite-dialect --external @gorules/zen-engine && bun build src/workflows/index.ts src/workflows/workflow-polling.helper.ts --outdir dist/workflows --target node --format esm --external zod --external kysely --external @electric-sql/pglite --external kysely-pglite-dialect --external @gorules/zen-engine && bun build src/rules/index.ts src/rules/rules.types.ts src/rules/rules-engine.service.ts --outdir dist/rules --target node --format esm --external zod --external kysely --external @electric-sql/pglite --external kysely-pglite-dialect --external @gorules/zen-engine && bun build src/config/index.ts src/config/workflow.config.ts --outdir dist/config --target node --format esm --external zod --external kysely --external @electric-sql/pglite --external kysely-pglite-dialect --external @gorules/zen-engine
